evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of including a photo/video release within the same form as the liability waiver. However, the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met, as it only describes the components of the waiver without explicitly stating that the photo/video release is integrated into the same form. This indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement as outlined in the linked use case.
gaps: Photo/video release is not confirmed to be included within the same form as the liability waiver.
